frames.title: The Plaza in the Loop
frames.caption: High above the Living Shade Loop, the majlis plaza reads as a warm terracotta-ringed circle on the figure-eight, its grand ghaf canopy dappling the seat walls beside the wadi bioswale.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic aerial drone shot slowly descending over a lush Dubai neighbourhood park at golden hour, a shaded figure-eight walking loop threading past a circular gathering plaza ringed by terracotta pergolas under one great ghaf tree, warm calm documentary mood.

frames.title: Arrival Under the Slats
frames.caption: Walking the loop toward the plaza, terracotta pergola slats stripe the path with shade while the ring of cushioned seat walls and the water's glint appear ahead under the ghaf.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic steadicam walking shot at eye level along a shaded park path in late afternoon Dubai light, terracotta pergola slats casting rhythmic shadows, gliding toward a circular plaza with built-in cushioned seating beneath a large ghaf tree, inviting and serene.

frames.title: Inside the Majlis Circle
frames.caption: Within the circle, grandparents and children share the cushioned ring wall around a low murmuring water element, the whole room cooled by one grand dappled ghaf canopy and its pergola halo.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic slow 180-degree orbit inside a circular majlis-style plaza where multigenerational families sit on cushioned stone seat walls around a shallow reflecting water bowl, dappled ghaf-tree light shifting overhead, warm communal late-afternoon atmosphere.

frames.title: Gliding Through the Room
frames.caption: An oblique sweep along the loop: the path dives under pergola ribs, brushes the wadi bioswale, and threads straight through the majlis circle with its hearing-loop ring and central water.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic FPV drone shot skimming low along a shaded figure-eight park loop at golden hour, banking through terracotta pergola ribs and across a circular community plaza with a central water feature, smooth continuous motion, energetic yet gentle mood.

frames.title: Opening Day
frames.caption: Day one: the plaza's ring, cushions, water and pergola halo are complete, but the ghaf is a staked sapling in fresh mulch and the understory is nursery plugs waiting for their first summer.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic locked-off timelapse-style shot of a brand-new circular plaza in a Dubai park at bright morning, a young staked ghaf sapling beside the seat wall ring, sparse fresh planting and crisp paving, hopeful beginnings mood.

frames.title: Year Two
frames.caption: Two years on, the same view: stakes removed, the ghaf's crown now leans over the water, the bioswale greens up, and the understory knits across the plaza edges.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic locked-off shot matching the opening-day framing, the same circular plaza two years later with an adolescent ghaf tree casting its first real shade over the seat walls, fuller green planting, soft mid-morning light, quiet growth mood.

frames.title: Year Five, Mature
frames.caption: Five years in, the identical frame: the ghaf has become the room's grand ceiling, shade pooling over cushions and water, the understory lush to the horizon.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic locked-off shot completing the growth sequence, the same plaza five years on with a mature ghaf canopy roofing the whole majlis circle in dappled shade, dense layered planting, warm settled late-morning light, fulfilled and abundant mood.

frames.title: Majlis After Isha
frames.caption: After isha the same circle glows: lanterns hang in the ghaf and sit by the dark mirror of water, families linger on the warm cushions beneath an ink sky and a sliver of moon.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic slow dolly-in at night inside the circular plaza after evening prayer, warm hanging lanterns glowing under a silhouetted ghaf canopy, reflections trembling on the still water bowl, families talking softly on cushioned seat walls, intimate starlit mood.
